# americancloud_image (Data Source)

Look up an OS image by its label.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "americancloud_image" "ubuntu" {
  label = "ubuntu-24.04-050826"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `label` (String) Image label, e.g. `ubuntu-24.04-050826`.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Image description.
- `id` (String) Image identifier (UUID).
- `os` (String) Operating system.
- `version` (String) OS version.
